LanguageData.HDH_BasicDensity.label: basic-density hydroponics
LanguageData.HDH_BasicDensity.description: Develops the first generation of dense, multi-layer hydroponic infrastructure. Unlocks the basic-density hydroponics bay, a compact 1x4 basin that supports 16 plants and provides roughly four times the growing area in the same footprint. It can rely on sunlight or enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost, but it still requires steady power and does not regulate temperature.
LanguageData.HDH_HighDensity.label: high-density hydroponics
LanguageData.HDH_HighDensity.description: Refines tray stacking, nutrient circulation, and lighting control for industrial dense farming. Unlocks the high-density hydroponics bay, a 2x4 basin that supports 80 plants and provides roughly ten times the growing area in the same footprint. It can rely on sunlight or enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost, but it still requires steady power and does not regulate temperature.
LanguageData.HDH_HighDensity_Ultra.label: ultra-density hydroponics
LanguageData.HDH_HighDensity_Ultra.description: Pushes dense hydroponic engineering into advanced materials and large-scale environmental support. Unlocks the ultra-density hydroponics bay, a 2x6 basin that supports 240 plants and provides roughly twenty times the growing area in the same footprint. It can rely on sunlight or enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost, but it still requires steady power and does not regulate temperature.
LanguageData.HDH_HighDensity_Quantum.label: quantum-density hydroponics
LanguageData.HDH_HighDensity_Quantum.description: Applies quantum field manipulation to collapse multiple growth layers into a single compact chamber. Unlocks the quantum-density hydroponics bay, a 2x2 spacer-grade basin whose capacity scales with power and which can enable a built-in sun lamp at extra power cost while still ignoring ordinary temperature limits.
